section_miscategorizations.text: He also recommends a referral to gastroenterology for further evaluation and management of the patient's kidney stones.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence introduces a new problem (kidney stones) and implies an assessment that they require further evaluation and management, but no prior assessment or context for kidney stones appears in the A section. The referral/order component belongs in P, but the first mention and clinical framing of this problem would more appropriately be introduced in A.
